name: opencards
description: Deterministic card-game engine, editor and simulator.

scripts.dev: echo 'Phase 5 wires Vite dev server' && exit 0
scripts.build:app: npm run build --workspace=@opencards/core && npm run build:web --workspace=@opencards/app
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run test && npm run verify:coverage-overall && npm run verify:replay && npm run verify:hidden-info
scripts.verify:mvp: echo 'verify:mvp is not implemented until Phase 7 — use npm run check for the Phase 0 gate. See docs/roadmap.md and docs/adr/0004-dev-system-phase-0-deferrals-and-runner.md' && exit 1
